meaning: adj.托斯卡纳的,托斯卡纳式的n.托斯卡纳人,托斯卡纳语
examples: We enter the Tuscan plain in heightened spirits.
Such landscapes are found in abundance in and around the Tuscan countryside.
The match at the San Paolo stadium will not be easy at all for the Tuscan side.
And following in the tradition of Tuscan cuisine, there is no pasta on the menu.
Duchman's property also houses a Tuscan-style trattoria, helmed by famed chef, restaurateur and former winery partner, Damian Mandola.
